Project Structure

Project Structure

Ravix doesn’t enforce a specific structure, but this layout scales well for production applications.

Recommended Layout

Layer Responsibilities

LayerResponsibilityExample
ControllersHTTP concerns: routing, extraction, serializationUserController
ServicesBusiness logic, orchestration, transactionsUserService
RepositoriesData access, queries, persistenceUserRepository
ModelsDomain entities, DTOs, request/response typesUser, CreateUserDto

Module Organization

DI Container Setup

Scaling Tips

  1. Feature folders — For large apps, group by feature instead of layer:

  2. Shared kernel — Extract common types to a shared crate for multi-service projects.

  3. Test isolation — Keep integration tests in tests/ with their own DI setup.
